texto: Some girls have to go to college to discover what they are good at
autor: some are born doing what they must without even truly knowing why. I felt a hole in my heart shaped like a dark door I needed to guard.
explicacao: Orientação direta de some are born doing what they must without even truly knowing why. I felt a hole in my heart shaped like a dark door I needed to guard. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “Some girls have to go to college to discover what they are good at” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, catherynne-m-valente, girls, útil em momentos de reflexao.
